narrative:
Precinct Wapakoneta 3A (precinct in Auglaize County) has 616 registered voters, with 66.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.2 percentage points.
